name: Election to Deduct Start-up Expenditures

eligibility.description: Taxpayer must be starting or acquiring an active trade or business. The $5,000 immediate deduction phases out if total start-up costs exceed $50,000.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows an immediate deduction of up to $5,000 in business start-up costs in the year the business begins, with the remainder amortized over 180 months.
